headline: RBC Capital Reiterates Sector Perform on American Tower, Maintains $195 Price Target
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Jonathan Atkin   reiterates American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a Sector Perform and maintains $195 price target.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on American Tower, Raises Price Target to $208
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Niknam   maintains American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $205 to $208.

raw.headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on American Tower, Raises Price Target to $208
raw.summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Niknam   maintains American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $205 to $208.

headline: American Tower Leans On CoreSite 100Gbps Push For AI Growth
summary: CoreSite, a data center business of American Tower (NYSE:AMT), has introduced 100Gbps connectivity across its nationwide Open Cloud Exchange platform. This upgrade is designed to support AI, machine learning, and other high-performance workloads that require very high bandwidth. American Tower has raised its full year outlook as it seeks to benefit from rising demand for digital infrastructure tied to cloud and AI use cases. For investors watching NYSE:AMT, the CoreSite data center segment...
